sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 9.32 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.9)

statement.latex: What locally compact groups satisfy the following condition: the product of any two closed subgroups is also a closed subgroup? Abelian groups with this property were described in (Yu.\,N.\,Mukhin, Math. Notes, 8 (1970), 755--760). { Yu.\,N.\,Mukhin} Such groups are described (W.\,Herfort, K.\,H.\,Hofmann, F.\,G.\,Russo, , 390 (2021), 107894).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
